message:
Add benchmarking suite and UI component tests

This commit introduces performance benchmarking infrastructure and
snapshot-based testing for UI components, enabling regression detection
and performance profiling across the codebase.

Benchmarking suite (benches/):
- search_perf.rs: measures search query execution time across both backends
  - Tantivy full-text search latency (phrase, boolean, fuzzy queries)
  - SQLite FTS5 search latency (simple keyword queries)
  - Backend selection overhead and fallback latency
  - Result rendering and snippet extraction performance
  - Configurable corpus size (1K, 10K, 100K messages) for scaling tests
  - Throughput metrics (queries per second at different corpus sizes)

- index_perf.rs: benchmarks indexing pipeline throughput
  - Per-connector ingestion rate (messages/sec, conversations/sec)
  - Bulk insert performance (batched vs individual transactions)
  - Tantivy indexing throughput (document adds, commits, merges)
  - SQLite insert performance (single vs bulk, with/without indexes)
  - Parallel connector execution overhead (rayon thread pool)
  - Watch mode delta detection latency (incremental vs full rebuild)
  - Memory usage profiling (heap, stack, peak resident set)

Criterion integration:
- Statistical analysis of benchmark results (mean, median, stddev)
- HTML report generation for visualization (target/criterion/)
- Regression detection with configurable thresholds (5% default)
- Warm-up iterations to eliminate cold-start bias
- Multiple sample sizes for confidence intervals

UI component tests (tests/):
- ui_footer.rs: validates footer rendering with different state:
  - Hotkey legend display correctness for each mode
  - Active filter badge rendering
  - Database stat formatting (conversation count, message count)
  - Mode indicator styling and position
  - Terminal size adaptation (truncation on narrow terminals)

- ui_help.rs: snapshot testing of help overlay content:
  - Section structure and ordering
  - Keybinding documentation completeness
  - Styling consistency (span colors, alignment)
  - Content accuracy (matches actual TUI behavior)
  - Theme variation rendering (dark vs light mode)

- ui_snap.rs: visual regression tests for TUI components:
  - Conversation list rendering (with various sort/filter states)
  - Detail view formatting (message roles, timestamps, metadata)
  - Search result highlighting (match context, snippets)
  - Filter panel layout (checkbox states, active indicators)
  - Loading states and error messages

Testing infrastructure:
- Uses insta crate for snapshot management (accept/reject workflow)
- Ratatui TestBackend for headless rendering
- Fixtures for realistic conversation data (all six connectors)
- Deterministic timestamps for reproducible snapshots

Performance targets (informal):
- Search latency: <50ms for typical query on 10K messages
- Indexing throughput: >1000 messages/sec on modern hardware
- TUI render latency: <16ms (60fps) for smooth scrolling

CI integration:
- Benchmarks run on release branches only (slow)
- UI tests run on every PR (fast snapshot comparison)
- Regression alerts when performance degrades >10%

This testing infrastructure provides:
1. Confidence in refactoring (catch visual regressions)
2. Performance profiling (identify bottlenecks)
3. Documentation of expected behavior (living specs)
4. Regression prevention (detect performance degradation)
